allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5001/api/score -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query": "Customer wants to migrate from SOAP to REST API for their product configurator integration"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5001/api/rules -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"warnings": ["Do not accept requests that require custom ERP-specific code"], "oks": ["REST API migrations are standard and accepted"]}')
